# Test SSE transport server functionality

# Create an SSE server to test
mkdir -p cmd/mcp-sse-server
cat > cmd/mcp-sse-server/main.go << 'EOF'
package main

import (
	"context"
	"encoding/json"
	"flag"
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/tmc/mcp"
)

func main() {
	var port int
	flag.IntVar(&port, "port", 8080, "Port to listen on")
	flag.Parse()

	server := mcp.NewServer("sse-test-server", "1.0.0")

	// Register a simple tool
	tool := mcp.Tool{
		Name:        "time",
		Description: "Get current time",
		InputSchema: []byte(`{"type":"object"}`),
	}

	server.RegisterTool(tool, func(ctx context.Context, req mcp.CallToolRequest) (*mcp.CallToolResult, error) {
		return &mcp.CallToolResult{
			Content: []any{
				mcp.TextContent{
					Type: "text",
					Text: fmt.Sprintf("Current time: %s", time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339)),
				},
			},
		}, nil
	})

	// Create SSE server transport
	sseTransport := mcp.NewSSEServerTransport("test-target")

	// Set up HTTP handler
	http.HandleFunc("/mcp", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
			http.Error(w, "Method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
			return
		}

		// For this test, we'll just respond with a simple message
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "ok", "transport": "sse"})
	})

	// Start HTTP server in background
	go func() {
		log.Printf("SSE server listening on port %d\n", port)
		if err := http.ListenAndServe(fmt.Sprintf(":%d", port), nil); err != nil {
			log.Fatal(err)
		}
	}()

	// Wait a bit for server to start
	time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)

	// Test the transport dial method (it should return error for server transport)
	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 1*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	
	if _, err := sseTransport.Dial(ctx); err == nil {
		log.Fatal("Expected error from SSE server transport Dial, got nil")
	}

	fmt.Println("SSE server test completed successfully")
}
EOF

# Test SSE server
echo "Testing SSE server transport..."
go run cmd/mcp-sse-server/main.go --port 8899 &
SSE_PID=$!

# Give server time to start
sleep 0.5

# Test that server started and is responding
curl -X POST http://localhost:8899/mcp | grep -q '"transport":"sse"' || echo "SSE server test failed"

# Clean up
kill $SSE_PID 2>/dev/null || true

echo "SSE transport tests completed"
